text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: All right, today's the day! I'm gonna get all the Umamusume to believe in feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, Trainer. ☆ All I have to do is break it
down so it's easy to understand.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, you over there! ♪ You were doing great
with your training just now, but I can see a way to
improve it even more using feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If you want to strengthen the power of your lucky
direction, you should pay more attention to the
five elements. For example—
choice_data_list: Your steps have to be firm.
You have to be more persistent.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah, like making your steps firmer—just like this!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
See? By forging a deeper connection with the
earth, you'll naturally build up your lower body.
So...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: W-well... I guess that's not such a bad idea. But...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
It just feels kinda random. And this is something I
can't afford to be wrong about, y'know? Anyway,
see ya...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's right. You've gotta hang in there with all
you've got. Like this!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If you regulate your breathing, you'll be able to
picture your qi—and that'll let you focus on
training your grit!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: W-well... I guess that's not such a bad idea. But...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
It just feels kinda random. And this is something I
can't afford to be wrong about, y'know? Anyway,
see ya...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Wait! C'mon, it's not random!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...I guess that explains it, though. They're not
going to believe me if they think I'm wrong.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean people trust Acute's advice more
because it's based on her real experiences?

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Acuuute! I did exactly what you told me to do
and I still blew it!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Oh, goodness me. I'm terribly sorry about that.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
She was wrong! Trainer, Acute gets things wrong
too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if advice is based on personal experience,
that doesn't necessarily mean it's correct.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So it's not about being right or wrong. They just
trust Acute and not me.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What am I missing? I really do just want everyone
to be happy.
choice_data_list: Why don't you try asking Wonder Acute?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah. You're right—she might know.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hey, Acute. Can I talk to you for a second?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The reason people trust me? Well, if I had
to say...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Actually, I have no idea. Why do they trust me so much?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You don't even know the reason yourself?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid so. All I really do is tell them my old
stories.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
My past experiences, how I felt, that sort of
thing.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
There's so much to go over. I remember when I
finally had the chance to race against that Falco.
Ooh, she was as strong as a demon...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: And I was so close to beating her. So very, very close. But I couldn't quite manage it. When I think back to that race...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I remember all the other racers there too. Like the
one who had come from the countryside, or the
one who took a tumble on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
From rags-to-riches to reeling and rolling. By
golly, was I surprised to see it all.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, all I do is share stories of the
Umamusume I've met, just how I remember them.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't tell you why everyone keeps coming
back for more. I don't even fancy myself much of
a storyteller.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
The best I can manage is relaying the time I've
spent laughing and crying alongside my fellow
runners.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You're just... sharing your experiences... That's
all...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That's all, and yet... Trainer, just now, I...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I was so absorbed in her story. My heart was
pounding.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: How did that happen? And why?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think I've figured it out. The difference between
Copano Rickey and Wonder Acute is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: "Credibility"?
choice_data_list:
Yeah. It resonated with you because it was an
authentic, heartfelt story.

Yeah. It resonated with you because it was an
authentic, heartfelt story.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not about being right or wrong. Umamusume
dedicate their lives to racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why they trust stories based on lived
experience. If they buy into fantasy, they'll just
be left with regret.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I get it. So ordinary people believed what I said
about feng shui because they thought it was fun...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But the serious runners are different. They won't
be convinced unless a story has a strong dragon
vein—a living, breathing truth behind it...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's not about how easy it is to understand, or how
accurate it is. I can try as many different
approaches as I want...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But unless I make a real breakthrough, they'll
never accept my feng shui. Especially not the
racers who are the most lost.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I don't quite have the full picture, Rickey, but
whatever it is, remember to pace yourself, okay?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
You're a good girl, so I'm sure you'll figure things
out before long.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Thanks, Acute.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I've got it. I know what to do now.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
An unknowable future can't compete with real
past experiences. Feng shui's not suited for that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sounds a little dejected. Maybe this
realization has left her in low spirits.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: But there's something else that can compete.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Isn't there, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I'm talking about the present. The moment we're living in. The world right in front of us.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If I can prove what feng shui can do right before
everyone's eyes, I'm sure they'll believe in
me—just like they believe in Acute!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All I have to do is make myself the compass that
points to where the qi flows!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression is bright and her gaze sharp. I can
really see the twinkle of a dragon's eye in hers.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna do it, Trainer. Just wait and see.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No more talk of shifting our focus away from
racing. This feeling—this hope—it's not meant to
be conveyed through words...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I need to show everyone with my actions! I'll pour
it into my running and rock everyone who watches
me down to their cores!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'll improve my running in time for the Champions
Cup, and then...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna catch up to Tarumae! It doesn't matter
how far ahead of me she is! I'm gonna prove that
my feng shui's the real deal!
